content: We can refactor the 2025 configurable ICM for swarm UAV autonomous agents to use PCA (as formalized by Abdi and Williams 2010) to dynamically compress the high-dimensional inverse dynamics prediction space that ICM uses to calculate intrinsic reward. This compression automatically filters out noisy stochastic environment features that normally generate spurious false novelty rewards, while retaining only the most semantically meaningful state variation for curiosity-driven exploration.
